narrative:
New Franklin 1-A (precinct in Summit County) has 790 registered voters, with 58.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.0 percentage points.
